summary: Bug fix verification for online appointments not appearing in daily planning view. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend functionality verified working. The fix correctly auto-assigns first active operator when booking via public page without selecting operator. Daily, weekly, and monthly views all function correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests used existing services and operators, created temporary test appointments that were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for online booking operator auto-assign is working correctly. The fix is in backend/server.py lines 1803-1819 (create_public_booking function). Frontend PlanningPage.jsx has 'Non assegnato' column logic at lines 639-644. All existing appointments have operators assigned.

BUG_FIX_1_Auto_Assign_Operator.details: When booking via /prenota without selecting operator, the backend auto-assigns first active operator. Tested via API and verified appointment.operator_id is populated.

BUG_FIX_2_Explicit_Operator_Selection.details: When user explicitly selects an operator on /prenota, that selection is preserved correctly.

BUG_FIX_3_Daily_View_Shows_Online_Appoin.details: Appointments created via public booking appear in daily planning grid because they now have operator_id assigned.

FEATURE_Daily_View.details: Daily planning view shows time grid with operator columns. Appointments displayed with correct colors and client names.

FEATURE_Weekly_View.details: Weekly view shows all 7 days with appointment cards. Shows client name, time, and service details.

FEATURE_Monthly_View.details: Monthly calendar view shows appointment counts and previews for each day.

FEATURE_Login_Flow.details: Login with melitobruno@gmail.com / password123 works correctly.

FEATURE_Internal_Appointment_Creation.details: Creating appointments from planning page with operator works. Creating without operator also works (frontend 'Non assegnato' column catches these).

FEATURE_Edit_Appointment.details: Edit dialog opens when clicking appointment. Shows Date, Time, Operator fields with Elimina (Delete), Annulla (Cancel), Salva (Save) buttons.

FEATURE_Update_Appointment_Time.details: Updating appointment time via API works correctly.

FEATURE_Update_Appointment_Operator.details: Changing operator for an appointment works. operator_id, operator_name, operator_color all updated.

FEATURE_Delete_Appointment.details: Deleting appointment via API works. Returns 404 when trying to GET deleted appointment.

FEATURE_Public_Booking_Page.details: Public booking page (/prenota) has 3-step flow: Services -> Date/Time/Operator -> Client Details. Operator dropdown defaults to 'Nessuna preferenza' (empty).

bug_fix_summary.original_bug: Appointments booked via /prenota without selecting operator were not visible in daily planning grid view, but appeared in weekly and monthly views.
bug_fix_summary.root_cause: The daily planning grid only renders columns for active operators. Appointments without operator_id had no column to appear in.
fix_applied: Backend (server.py lines 1813-1819): Auto-assigns first active operator when public booking has no operator_id selected
Frontend (PlanningPage.jsx lines 639-644): Added 'Non assegnato' column as safety net for any appointments with null/unmatched operator_id
Data migration: Existing 23 appointments without operator were bulk-updated (mentioned in problem statement)
bug_fix_summary.verification: All tests pass. Online bookings now correctly appear in daily view.
